reason: While removing an unused package is generally safe, the remediation script explicitly warns that removing gssproxy may trigger the removal of other dependent packages. Since gssproxy is used for GSS-API (Kerberos) authentication, its removal could impact network authentication or specific service dependencies in an enterprise environment.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential removal of unintended dependent packages via dnf; Possible impact on Kerberos/GSS-API authentication services
